query:
-- Fix school_contacts: rename 'status' to 'schoolOutreachStatus', rename 'region' to 'district', add missing columns
ALTER TABLE `school_contacts`
  CHANGE COLUMN `status` `schoolOutreachStatus` ENUM('not_sent','sent','responded','no_reply','meeting') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'not_sent',
  CHANGE COLUMN `region` `district` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `lastEmailedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `followUpDate` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `followUpSent` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `followUpSentAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `replyNotes` TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `replyReceivedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `finalNudgeSent` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `finalNudgeSentAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `internalNotes` TEXT NULL;

-- Fix school_contacts: rename 'status' to 'schoolOutreachStatus', rename 'region' to 'district', add missing columns
ALTER TABLE `school_contacts`
  CHANGE COLUMN `status` `schoolOutreachStatus` ENUM('not_sent','sent','responded','no_reply','meeting') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'not_sent',
  CHANGE COLUMN `region` `district` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `lastEmailedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `followUpDate` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `followUpSent` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `followUpSentAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `replyNotes` TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `replyReceivedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `finalNudgeSent` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `internalNotes` TEXT NULL;
